productDisplayName: Spykar Men Ranger Blue Navy Checks Shirts
description: Composition Light and navy blue checked shirt made of 100% cotton with white and black accents, two chest pockets with buttoned flaps and thread detailing, brand printing on right pocket, numbered buttons on the left pocket, full hand sleeves with mid-sleeve buttoned flap, front buttoned placket, tipped collar with checked tape and panel on the inseam and curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Checks that add immense style to your casual look is what scullers brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and black footwear to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
